role: A React host component that mounts an external vanilla "DNA" gallery renderer inside a stable DOM container and orchestrates modal drill-in, decision slides, deep-links, and post-write rerenders via window events.
capabilities: Hosts DNA.renderGallery in a React-stable #gallery-mount container
Binds projection drill listener once with a module-level guard
Opens/closes a modal gallery face on gallery:rendered and projection:select
Renders decision cards via DNA with loading state and queue-return behavior
Handles ?decide= deep-link and decision:open inbox events
Refreshes the currently mounted face on gallery:rerender after writes
Supplies a grounded resolve override to DNA when enabled
Toggles body class for modal chrome and handles Esc/scrim/close dismissal
Emits decision:ready signal after a decision card renders
substance_why: The file implements a full lifecycle host with multiple event seams, deep-link and inbox openers, rerender refresh, grounded resolve injection, loading states, and extensive inline design rationale.
interactions_present: Click a projection point to drill into gallery face
Click close button to dismiss modal
?decide=<id> URL deep-link opens a decision card
decision:open event from inbox opens a decision card
gallery:rerender event refreshes the mounted face
decision:ready event emitted for driver consumers
interactions_missing: No focus trap or focus restoration for the modal
No explicit failure UI after the 20s polling window expires
No back-button/popstate handling for deep-linked decisions
No scroll lock beyond a body class
No decision-sequence walk driver (only 'slide' render_kind is handled)
No visible error state if DNA.renderGallery is permanently missing
No aria-live announcement for the loading state
performance_risks: Polls renderGallery every 250ms for up to 80 attempts (20s) on decision open
Repeated DOM querySelector for data-decision-address on each tick
renderGallery re-fetches the corpus on every gallery:rerender with no deduplication
Synchronous string manipulation and DOM class toggling on every select/render
Window event listeners added/removed on every onOpenChange/dismiss dependency change
reuse_why: The DNA-host seam and event orchestration are domain-specific and worth keeping, but the modal chrome, decision opener, deep-link handling, and rerender logic should be decoupled.
decomposition_hints: Split the stable DNA container binding from the modal overlay chrome
Extract decision opening/deep-link/inbox queue logic into a dedicated hook or service
Extract rerender refresh orchestration into its own module
Move grounded resolve supply into a provider/hook consumed by the opener
Separate the loading/error/pending UI into a small presentational component
